item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly arbitrates between the long-term thesis and the immediate organizational action: it accepts AI testing as the likely main direction while rejecting immediate QA dissolution as unsafe. It blocks/downgrades the irreversible action into restructuring and staged adoption, and provides concrete trigger conditions/metrics over 2-3 releases before any downsizing or reorg. It does not merely agree/disagree or stack methods."}
